title: Calendar
description: A calendar shows a month view of dates and lets users navigate by day, week, or month. It can stand alone for browsing scheduled events or anchor a date or date-range picker.
whenToUse: Use when users need to see dates in their full month context — picking a range, scanning availability, or selecting from a visible grid.
whenNotToUse: For a single date inside a form, use Date Picker. For typing a date directly, use Text Input with a date format helper.
acceptanceCriteria: Figma component set exists and exposes variant properties
Examples and Code tabs are generated from inspected Figma structure
Component CSS uses UDS tokens only
Spec JSON reaches required minimum plus props/states/accessibility
knownIssues: Drafted ahead of design — no inspectable component set yet in Figma. Examples, CSS implementation, playground, and Demo Builder entry are intentionally deferred until the Figma component set is available.
